description: Sovereign Vault Ledger — token metadata registry. Secret values live in GitHub Secrets; this ledger tracks what exists, its purpose, scope, and access policy.

tokens.notes: Write-only Zenodo deposit token. Cannot publish — human approval required for publication.
Agent-accessible write token with email scope. Used by Copilot and Claude for sovereign deposit operations.
NPM registry token for automated package publishing in CI/CD workflows.
GitHub Actions token for deploying GitHub Pages. Scoped to specific repository.

integration.description: Tokens for external service integration — Zenodo, NPM, GitHub, ICP, IPFS, etc.

cognition.description: Tokens governing cognitive agent operations — memory read/write, reasoning chains, attention budgets.

memory.description: Tokens governing memory persistence — vault reads, ledger writes, checkpoint creation.

system.description: System-level tokens for platform operations — governance enforcement, organism fleet coordination.

enterprise.description: Enterprise connector tokens — Salesforce, SAP, HubSpot, Stripe, Google, Shopify, Slack, Twilio, etc.

agent_write.description: Agents may use token for write operations without human approval

agent_read.description: Agents may use token for read-only operations

human_gate.description: Token usage requires explicit human approval per operation

sovereign_only.description: Only the sovereign owner may invoke — no agent access
